name: Bread- Linda's Bread Machine White
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the vegetable oil to the bread machine.
2. Add the salt to the bread machine.
3. Add the sugar to the bread machine.
4. Add the flour (Robin Hood Bread Machine) to the bread machine.
5. Add the yeast to the bread machine.
6. Pour hot tap water into the bread machine, then add the milk and water separately before starting the machine.
